shared_properties: Primary painted tone remains #535353 with transparent cutouts only.
Head, torso, and tail landmarks keep the run-core proportion grid.
differences: Both feet lift clear of the baseline to read airborne travel at the jump apex.
Tail angle rises by 8 px relative to the grounded body line.
Jaw line closes into a focused expression with one open eye.

reference_images.label: offline_sprite_1x
reference_images.purpose: 1x pixel atlas for dinosaur, cactus, pterodactyl, digits, and ground proportions.

reference_images.label: run_loop_capture
reference_images.purpose: Run cadence, jump silhouette timing, and restart screen pacing.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load one 88x94 PNG during Loading state and swap the sprite handle when the runner enters the airborne state.
runtime_notes: Keep the transform anchor at x=80 and y=32 while vertical velocity is nonzero.
Reuse the grounded collider width of 44 px and height of 90 px for predictable collision timing.
Bind the sprite swap to the jump state machine transition before gravity integration runs.

context.usage: Displayed from takeoff until landing while vertical velocity remains nonzero.

silhouette_notes: Hind legs tuck upward by 10 px relative to the run core baseline.
Tail tip rises 8 px to counterbalance the torso.
Mouth line stays horizontal and spans 12 px.

acceptance_criteria: Canvas is exactly 88x94 px and keeps transparent padding outside the silhouette.
All foot pixels sit above the ground contact line to remove grounded ambiguity.
The sprite reads clearly against #F7F7F7 without anti-aliased edges.
